Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.label

Interface RuleSpecificTask

All Known Subinterfaces:
ChildTermLabelPolicy, TermLabelRefactoring, TermLabelUpdate
All Known Implementing Classes:
BlockContractValidityTermLabelUpdate, FormulaTermLabelRefactoring, FormulaTermLabelUpdate, LoopBodyTermLabelUpdate, LoopInvariantNormalBehaviorTermLabelUpdate, OriginTermLabelRefactoring, RemoveInCheckBranchesTermLabelRefactoring, SymbolicExecutionTermLabelUpdate
public interface RuleSpecificTask
Instances of this class provides functionality only if a supported rule is active.
See Also:
  • ChildTermLabelPolicy
  • TermLabelUpdate
  • TermLabelRefactoring

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ImmutableList<Name>
    getSupportedRuleNames()
    Returns the supported rule Names or null or an empty list if all rules are supported.

  • Method Details

    • getSupportedRuleNames

      ImmutableList<Name> getSupportedRuleNames()
      Returns the supported rule Names or null or an empty list if all rules are supported.
      Returns:
      The list of supported rule Names or null/empty list if all rules are supported.
